member.name: T:MetaBrainz.Common.AsyncUtils
member.summary: Utility methods related to processing.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.AsyncUtils.ResultOf(System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: Synchronously awaits a task.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.AsyncUtils.ResultOf``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0})
member.summary: Synchronously awaits a task.
member.typeparam: The return type for the task.
member.returns: The value returned by the task when it completes.

member.name: T:MetaBrainz.Common.HttpUtils
member.summary: Utility methods related to HTTP processing.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.HttpUtils.CreateUserAgentHeader``1
member.summary: Create a user agent header containing the name and version of the assembly containing a particular type.
member.typeparam: The type to use to determine the assembly name and version.
member.returns: A user agent header containing the name and version of the assembly containing . If the assembly name cannot be obtained, will be used instead.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.HttpUtils.GetContentEncoding(System.Net.Http.Headers.HttpContentHeaders)
member.summary: Gets the content encoding based on content headers.
member.param: The headers to get the information from.
member.returns: The content encoding extracted from the headers, or "utf-8" as fallback if no explicit specification was found.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.HttpUtils.GetStringContent(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Gets the content of an HTTP response as a string.
member.returns: The content of as a string.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.HttpUtils.GetStringContentAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the content of an HTTP response as a string.
member.param: The cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The content of as a string.

member.name: F:MetaBrainz.Common.HttpUtils.UnknownAssemblyName
member.summary: The name used by when no assembly name is available.

member.name: T:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo
member.summary: Information about any rate limiting that is in effect, as returned in the response headers for web service requests.

member.name: P:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo.AllowedRequests
member.summary: The total number of requests allowed in the current time window, if available.
member.remarks: Corresponds to the value of the X-RateLimit-Limit header.

member.name: P:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo.LastRequest
member.summary: The date and time at which the last request was made.
member.remarks: This is the (client-side) timestamp to which can be added to determine the end of the window.

member.name: P:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo.RemainingRequests
member.summary: The number of requests remaining in the current time window, if available.
member.remarks: Corresponds to the value of the X-RateLimit-Remaining header.

member.name: P:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo.ResetAt
member.summary: The date and time at which the current time window expires, if available.
member.remarks:
Corresponds to the value of the X-RateLimit-Reset header.
If is available, its use is strongly recommended over this field, to avoid issues with clients with clocks that are not correctly set.

member.name: P:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo.ResetIn
member.summary: The number of seconds remaining until the current time window expires, if available.
member.remarks: Corresponds to the value of the X-RateLimit-Reset-In header.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.RateLimitInfo.#ctor(System.Net.Http.Headers.HttpResponseHeaders)
member.summary: Extracts rate limiting information from the headers of a web service response.
member.param: The web service response headers to get the rate limit information from.
member.returns:
Rate limit information, as extracted from .
will be set to the current (UTC) date/time.

member.name: T:MetaBrainz.Common.TextUtils
member.summary: Utility methods related to text processing.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.TextUtils.DecodeUtf8(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Decodes all the bytes in the specified span as a string, using the UTF-8 character set.
member.param: A read-only byte span to decode to a Unicode string.
member.returns: A string that contains the decoded bytes from the provided read-only span.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.TextUtils.FormatMultiLine(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Formats a string, including extra handling if it's multiline.
member.param: The string to format. Trailing line breaks are discarded.
The separator to use between lines.

member.name: T:MetaBrainz.Common.UnixTime
member.summary: Utility class for working with Unix time values (seconds since 1970-01-01T00:00:00).

member.name: F:MetaBrainz.Common.UnixTime.Epoch
member.summary: The epoch for Unix time values (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z).

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.UnixTime.Convert(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Computes the Unix time value corresponding to the specified date/time.
member.param: The date/time to convert to a Unix time value.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.UnixTime.Convert(System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Computes the Unix time value corresponding to the specified date/time.
member.param: The date/time to convert to a Unix time value.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.UnixTime.Convert(System.Int64)
member.summary: Computes the date/time corresponding to the specified Unix time value.
member.param: The Unix time value to convert to a date/time.

member.name: M:MetaBrainz.Common.UnixTime.Convert(System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Computes the date/time corresponding to the specified Unix time value.
member.param: The Unix time value to convert to a date/time.
